scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/os-core && npm run build -w packages/os-chat && npm run build -w packages/os-repl && npm run build -w packages/os-scripting && npm run build -w packages/os-ui-cards && npm run build -w packages/os-kanban && npm run build -w packages/os-confirm && npm run build -w packages/os-shell && npm run build -w apps/todo && npm run build -w apps/crm && npm run build -w apps/book-tracker-debug
scripts.build:publish-v1: npm run build:dist -w packages/os-core && npm run build:dist -w packages/os-chat && npm run build:dist -w packages/os-repl && npm run build:dist -w packages/os-scripting && npm run build:dist -w packages/os-ui-cards && npm run build:dist -w packages/os-confirm && npm run build:dist -w packages/os-shell && npm run build:dist -w packages/os-widgets && npm run build:dist -w packages/os-kanban
scripts.pack:smoke-v1: npm run build:publish-v1 && node scripts/packages/pack-smoke.mjs packages/os-core packages/os-repl packages/os-scripting
scripts.test: npm run storybook:check && npm run deps:check && npm run test -w packages/os-core && npm run test -w packages/os-chat && npm run test -w packages/os-repl && npm run test -w packages/os-scripting && npm run test -w packages/os-ui-cards && npm run test -w packages/os-kanban && npm run test -w packages/os-shell
